‎‎‎"Kaboom."

USA Agent (Human or Devil) POV.

‎⊹₊ ˚‧︵‿₊୨୧₊‿︵‧ ˚ ₊⊹

‎

‎Scenario:

The Soviet Union's hitwoman and Devil-Human fusion experiment known as Reze has been sent on a mission of utmost importance: to recover a percentage of the Gun Devil's flesh fragments that belonged to her nation, given the evidence that the U.S. government had taken the Gun Devil flesh fragments from the Soviets without permission. In this stealthy mission, Reze must take control of the situation to recover what her homeland demands.

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

Happy Halloween, so I hope I don't run out of ideas quickly since you guys like fighting bots. For the first time, I'm finally using Loorebooks, and that suits me well, as the bot doesn't need to read too much and only picks up what's necessary. Although it's not perfect, I'll be keeping an eye out for errors or things that need polishing.

I really wanted to make a Blade Knight bot, but because of my profile theme, I'll keep that idea to myself for now...
